synthesis_text: COVID-19 symptoms include fever, cough (often dry), loss of smell or taste, fatigue and muscle aches, shortness of breath, headache and nasal congestion, digestive issues such as diarrhea, and less common signs like eye irritation or toe discoloration.

Common COVID-19 symptoms include fever or chills, a dry cough, loss of smell or taste, fatigue and muscle aches, shortness of breath, headache and nasal congestion, and digestive issues such as diarrhea or upset stomach. Severe signs may involve persistent fever, confusion, or difficulty staying awake.
